description: The lab's Color-Naming Stroop study protocol configuration file at ~/pebl/lab/stroop_protocol.json has been accidentally overwritten with incorrect parameter values. The published protocol (Steinhauser & Huebner, 2009, replication) specifies: practice_trials=12, test_trials_per_block=48, blocks=4, isi_ms=500, response_colors=["red","blue","green","yellow"]. The current configuration file contains errors in ALL five of these parameters. Find and correct every error to match the canonical protocol values. The file must remain valid JSON after your edits. NOTE: The lab runs a multi-site replication with 8 partner universities — any parameter deviation propagates to all sites and would invalidate months of data collection. Double-check every value before saving.
